description: A dust-choked chamber hidden beneath the base of the mountains. Laces hang from the stone ceiling like cobwebs. A dim light filters down from a hole in the ceiling above. Willy warned you not to enter, but here you are — Fred accidentally fell down the hole!

stone_wall.description: Raw, jagged stone walls that sweat cold mountain moisture.

stone_floor.description: Cold, damp stone floors covered in a layer of fine dust.

sewing_machine_sue.description: Sue the Sewing Machine hums softly with electric life.

dialogue.text: "I'm Sue," squeaked the sewing machine, "and that's Saul, but he doesn't talk because he was stuck in wood and forgot how to communicate so he only grunts."
Willy asks: "Have you seen a screaming shoe that was lost?"
"No," replies Sue, "however, we heard a loud scream in the west corridor! That's definitely where you fell."
"Whatever you do, do not head to creativity or even worse, the unknown lands!" warns Sue.

saw_saul.description: Saul the Saw is sitting next to Sue, looking heavy and rustic.

dialogue.text: Saul lets out a disappointed grunt: "*Hmph... grrrr!*"
Saul points his metallic blade toward the eastern passage, directing you to the exit.

spiderweb_cellar.description: A small cramped cellar covered in thick spiderwebs and dust bunnies. This is where you fell down and lay yelping before Willy and Freddista found you.

exit_up.description: A shaft of dim light from the Peak of Misery above. You could climb back up.

exit_east.description: A low-hanging crawlspace leading further East into the mountain roots.
